creator: johan@stromnet.se
text: Fyi, I rebuilt hbase, zookeeper and hadoop2 ports to JAVA_VERSION=1.7+ and all built fine with openjdk8. Now running opentsdb, hbase, zookeeper on openjdk8, very simple setup so should not be regarded as a "full test", but it works the same as with openjdk7 from what I've seen so far.
